title: Care Events
description: Historical log of care events, observations, and confirmations.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was recorded.

type.description: Event type: watering_confirmed, neem_confirmed, fertilization_confirmed, rain_confirmed, photo_received, observation, plant_added, plant_archived, etc.

source.description: How this event was recorded: user_free_text, agent_inference, system, manual_update.

effectiveDateLocal.description: Local date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the event actually happened (may differ from recording timestamp).

effectivePrecision.description: How precisely the effective time is known.

effectivePartOfDay.description: Part of day, when precision is 'part_of_day'.

plantIds.description: Plant IDs affected by this event.
